---
name: Suggest a paper example
about: Propose a paper to include as an example in a chapter
title: 'examples(<chapter>): add <short paper handle>'
labels: examples
assignees: ''
---

## Paper details

- **Title:**
- **Authors:**
- **Venue and year:** (e.g. ACL 2024, EMNLP 2023)
- **ACL Anthology URL:** (or other stable URL if not on Anthology)

## Which chapter and section?

Which chapter does this example belong in, and which "five examples" section? See [chapters/](../../chapters/).

## What does this paper exemplify?

One or two sentences. What specific craft point does this paper demonstrate well? Not "it's a good paper" — what about its title / abstract / methods / results / etc. is worth studying?

## Should we swap out an existing example?

Each chapter section is capped at five examples. If you are proposing a sixth, suggest which existing one to drop and why. If you are just bringing this to maintainers' attention, leave this blank and we can discuss.

## Have you read the paper?

- [ ] Yes, I have read the full paper, not just the abstract.
- [ ] The ACL Anthology link above resolves correctly.
- [ ] The authors above match the Anthology metadata exactly.

(See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for why we require this.)
